title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses AutoResearch from Andrej Karpathy, presenting iterative self-improvement as a novel approach for software development. The technique is positioned as domain-specific rather than universal, offering a new perspective on development improvement strategies.
